description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building with a modern glass facade, featuring blue-tinted windows arranged in horizontal bands separated by white spandrels. The structure is topped with a flat, dark roof and a prominent antenna or spire extending from one corner. The windows are evenly spaced and cover the entire height of the building, giving it a sleek, uniform appearance. The building's exterior suggests a steel and concrete frame beneath the glass curtain wall. No visible signage or entrance details are present on the depicted sides. The overall design is minimalist, emphasizing verticality and transparency typical of contemporary urban office towers.
description: A tall, blue-glass office building with horizontal window bands, a flat roof, and a rooftop antenna.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the blue glass facade, horizontal window bands, and the rooftop antenna on the left.
description_view_1: Side view with the antenna now positioned centrally, maintaining the same window pattern and flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with the antenna on the right, displaying the same regular window arrangement and no visible entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the antenna on the far left, consistent window bands, and a flat roof.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, continuous horizontal bands of rectangular windows separated by white spandrels, evenly spaced across all floors.
